docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MYRIAM , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT SOLLISON, SARAH DIHMES ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
